allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$src = 'F:\\내 드라이브\\02.프로그래밍\\07.두두타\\02.캔버스 도트변환\\githubiotest'
\\$dst = 'F:\\내 드라이브\\02.프로그래밍\\07.두두타\\02.캔버스 도트변환\\githubio'

foreach \(\\$dir in @\('application','config','domain','infrastructure','js','python','styles'\)\) {
  Copy-Item -Path \\"\\$src\\\\\\$dir\\" -Destination \\"\\$dst\\\\\\$dir\\" -Recurse -Force
  Write-Host \\"copied: \\$dir\\"
}

Copy-Item -Path \\"\\$src\\index.html\\" -Destination \\"\\$dst\\index.html\\" -Force
Copy-Item -Path \\"\\$src\\favicon.png\\" -Destination \\"\\$dst\\favicon.png\\" -Force
Write-Host 'done'
")

Bash(cmd /c "attrib -R -H -S \\"F:\\\\내 드라이브\\\\02.프로그래밍\\\\07.두두타\\\\02.캔버스 도트변환\\\\githubio\\\\githubiotest\\\\.git\\\\objects\\\\*\\" /S /D && rd /S /Q \\"F:\\\\내 드라이브\\\\02.프로그래밍\\\\07.두두타\\\\02.캔버스 도트변환\\\\githubio\\\\githubiotest\\" && echo done")
